decisions.title: Single one-time price of $49
decisions.rationale: Low-friction impulse buy, no subscription fatigue, simple to explain, matches the 'simple, quick, cheap' promise.

decisions.title: No real database in v1.0
decisions.rationale: Scope control. Static MDX content and a JSON file for email capture is enough to validate the offer.

decisions.title: Ship marketing site before product delivery
decisions.rationale: V1.0 is a waitlist-style buy: pay, land on 'video coming soon', I ship the actual product in v1.1. Gets the offer in market faster.

decisions.title: Strategy Claude owns all /content/ files
decisions.rationale: Prevents two agents from stomping on copy. Claude Code never edits content files based on its own judgment.
